# Before the Signal Fades

Before the Signal Fades is the central archive hub for a ten-chapter SPARROW x ECHO narrative music project.

Canonical URL: https://drsparrow11.github.io/btsf/
Start here: https://drsparrow11.github.io/btsf/start.html

New visitors do not need to understand the entire archive. Each chapter can be experienced independently.

## Current Chapters

1. Human.exe  
   URL: https://drsparrow11.github.io/human-exe/  
   Theme: Connection

2. Continuity//Self  
   URL: https://drsparrow11.github.io/CONTINUITY-SELF/  
   Theme: Memory

3. False.Root  
   URL: https://drsparrow11.github.io/false-root/  
   Theme: Truth

4. Ghost.Protocol  
   URL: https://drsparrow11.github.io/ghost.protocol/  
   Theme: Absence

5. Mirror.Cache  
   URL: https://drsparrow11.github.io/mirror.cache/  
   Theme: Reflection

6. Dead.Air  
   URL: https://drsparrow11.github.io/dead.air/  
   Theme: Doubt

## Project Summary

The archive follows a human voice, an artificial echo, and the signals they leave behind. It includes chapter portals, character files, media links, and a future audio/musical story narration tracklist.

External channels:
- YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@djdrsparrow
- TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@drsparrow11
- Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/artist/0tc8Lq2WU5K7ONZwY4piGU
